arts.ttl: Liverpool owners insist they have NO intention of selling after Elon Musk's father revealed the billionaire wants to buy the club in bombshell interview
arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN: In a bombshell admission the tech billionaire's father recently claimed his son would be interested in buying the Merseyside giants from Fenway Sports Group.

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister explains why he mocked Lisandro Martinez after Man Utd draw
arts.sum: Lisandro Martinez and Alexis Mac Allister's relationship as Argentina team-mates was put aside as the former's Manchester United held the latter's Liverpool to a 2-2 draw at Anfield

arts.ttl: Harvey Elliott explains how Arne Slot has turned Liverpool into 'actors' on the pitch
arts.sum: Arne Slot has lost just one of his 28 matches in charge of Liverpool and midfielder Harvey Elliott has lifted the lid on the Dutchman's methods on the training ground

arts.ttl: VAR changes for Carabao Cup semi-final explained: How Liverpool will be affected by PGMOL call
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip as changes are being introduced for the Reds' Carabao Cup semi-final against Tottenham

arts.ttl: Team News: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Liverpool injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's EFL Cup clash between Tottenham Hotspur and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'have gone BACKWARDS' as an attacking team and 'have not been enjoyable to watch,' Jamie Redknapp claims - as Gunners continue to chase Liverpool in Premier League title race
arts.sum: The Gunners are chasing Liverpool in the Premier League title race, currently six points behind the Reds, who have a game in hand, after both sides drew their respective games at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's stance on selling club to Elon Musk as billionaire's dad reveals interest
arts.sum: Liverpool have had no contact from Elon Musk and Fenway Sports Group have no interest in selling the club - after it emerged that the billionaire is interested in buying the club

arts.ttl: Elon Musk stance on purchasing Liverpool revealed as his father addresses rumours
arts.sum: Elon Musk has been rumoured with a potential purchase of Liverpool

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold contract latest: Has Arne Slot lost defender to Real Madrid after shock performance in Manchester United draw?
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is under increasing scrutiny following his performance against Manchester United last Sunday amidst speculation he is set to join Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Manchester United: Premier League title race blow for Arne Slot as Ruben Amorim's side give Arsenal boost
arts.sum: Liverpool's performance against Manchester United in the Premier League on Sunday is a cause for concern for boss Arne Slot, as the Dutchman looks to fend off Arsenal.
